metadata.description: Marketplace hosting the kiho plugin — a single-entry multi-agent orchestration harness for Claude Code.

plugins.name: kiho
plugins.description: Single-entry multi-agent orchestration harness for Claude Code. A Ralph-style CEO agent runs a per-turn autonomous loop over a project's plan.md, delegating to department leads, committees, and vendored skills; backed by a three-tier storage doctrine (Tier-1 markdown canonical, Tier-2 JSONL/YAML/TOML processing, Tier-3 on-demand sqlite/embeddings), a live org registry and capability matrix, a two-tier Karpathy-style knowledge base gated by a sole kb-manager agent, and a declarative cycle-runner kernel. v6.1 lands the v5.23 OA-integration roadmap: declarative approval chains (references/approval-chains.toml) + unified chain-aware hook; new core/okr/ skill portfolio (okr-set / okr-checkin / okr-close) with per-level RACI gates; bin/dashboard.py for period rollups; bin/agent_cycle_score.py for telemetry-derived promotion signal; lightweight-committee variant; memo-send wildcards + Tier-1 announcements + shift-handoff re-surface; retrospective process-friction section + bin/pulse_aggregate.py. v6.0 auto-evolution layer and v5.22 runtime gates preserved. Single user entry point: /kiho.
